name: Famous Amos Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter until light and fluffy using an electric mixer on high speed.
2. Beat in sugars until very creamy.
3. Beat in eggs, then each remaining ingredient (except chips and pecans) one at a time.
4. Mix in chocolate chips and chopped pecans with a spoon until incorporated.
5. Roll the dough into grape-sized pieces and place 1 inch apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 14 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Freeze unbaked cookie dough to thaw, shape, and bake in four months.
